calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jackie Martins appeared by telephone for Randy Bruce.

The Court stated that it was satisified that the Franchise Tax Board is aware of the proceeding and has dealt with the Estate obligations. The Accounting Petition was taken under submission for Counsel to file the stipulation regarding allocation of Attorney fees and reimbursement amounts.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
